title: [BUG] Table creation accepts illegal Table names without complaint, resulting in corrupted Excel files
author: georgbuehler

comments.author: AshotN
comments.body: Just ran into this same issue, thank you for documenting that table names can't have spaces. Would be good to have some sort of fix in for this

comments.author: abeel50
comments.body: @georgbuehler I faced the same issues a few days back I would like to create this PR.

comments.author: georgbuehler
comments.body: @abeel50 @AshotN FYI, I just made a [PR to address this issue](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/pull/2767).

comments.author: TimUnderhay-StellarCyber
comments.body: I've just wasted hours due to this bug.  It would be amazing if someone would accept @georgbuehler 's PR.
